description: Static lookup table mapping famous scaffold names to canonical PDB IDs. Consumed by enzyme-scaffold-mapper driver as a fallback when the LLM identifies a scaffold by name but no PDB ID appears verbatim in the paper. Stores name->PDB only; sequences are always fetched fresh from RCSB FASTA in the normalizer.

entries.notes: Sperm whale myoglobin; WT scaffold for Mb(*) variants in Bhattacharya 2022, Moroz 2013/2015 etc.
AlleyCat is calmodulin-EF-hand-based; 2KZ2 is the AlleyCat structure (Korendovych 2011).
KE07 designed Kemp eliminase, Roethlisberger 2008; parent scaffold 1THF.
KE59 designed Kemp eliminase; parent scaffold IGPS PDB 1A53.
KE70 designed Kemp eliminase; parent scaffold DERA PDB 1JCL.
HG3 designed Kemp eliminase, Privett 2012 / Blomberg 2013 / Broom 2020.
Pseudomonas testosteroni KSI; used in Lamba 2017.
Bacillus megaterium cytochrome P450 BM3 (heme domain).
